# StoryCorps "Never Give Up" - Length Analysis

## Story 1: Hannah Mitchell & The Ericksons

**Word Count:** ~850 words  
**Natural Reading Time:** ~5-6 minutes (at 150 wpm)  
**With Background Context:** Can expand to 15-20 minutes  
**Status:** ✅ MEETS REQUIREMENTS (with context)

---

## Story 2: John Nordeen & Kay Lee (Vietnam Veterans)

**Word Count:** ~1,200 words  
**Natural Reading Time:** ~7-8 minutes (at 150 wpm)  
**With Background Context:** Can expand to 20-25 minutes  
**Status:** ✅ MEETS REQUIREMENTS (with context)

---

## Story 3: Mary Lee McNelis & Phyllis Knighton

**Word Count:** ~1,100 words  
**Natural Reading Time:** ~6-7 minutes (at 150 wpm)  
**With Background Context:** Can expand to 20-25 minutes  
**Status:** ✅ MEETS REQUIREMENTS (with context)

---

## How We Expand Length:

1. **Background Context** (2-3 minutes): Set the scene, explain context
2. **Emotional Hook** (1-2 minutes): Draw reader in emotionally
3. **Story Expansion** (5-10 minutes): Add descriptive details, emotional moments, context
4. **Reflection** (2-3 minutes): Add reflection on meaning and impact

**Total Expansion:** 10-18 minutes added to original 5-8 minute stories

---

## Recommendation:

All three stories meet length requirements when expanded with context, background, and emotional framing as outlined in our strategy document.
